Functions
fza_audio_fnc_addWarning
Description
Parameters
_heli: object

the apache the player is in

_priority: Number

message priorty

_audio: string

Cfg Audio File

_audiolength: number

Length of audio file

Returns

No returns

Examples

[_heli, 6, _audio, _audiolength] call fza_audio_fnc_addWarning;

Author

Snow(Dryden)
